description_long: This object depicts a police officer dressed in a dark tactical uniform, featuring a fitted long-sleeve shirt and matching pants. The officer is equipped with a prominent bulletproof vest that covers the torso, and a utility belt with visible pouches and gear attached at the waist. The figure wears a dark helmet that provides head protection, and the uniform includes sturdy boots suitable for urban environments. The back view reveals additional pouches and a compact backpack or pouch on the right hip. The overall appearance is that of a modern, urban tactical police officer prepared for active duty.
description: A modern police officer in a dark tactical uniform with a bulletproof vest, helmet, and utility belt.
description_view_0: Front view showing the officer's bulletproof vest, helmet, and utility belt details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the helmet, vest, and the side pouches on the belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the helmet, vest, and a pouch or small backpack on the right hip.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the uniform, helmet, and belt equipment.
attribute_uniform_type: Tactical police uniform with long-sleeve shirt, matching pants, black bulletproof vest, and utility belt; dark color scheme with helmet and boots.
attribute_headgear_style: Black tactical helmet with a smooth, rounded shape and no visible insignia.
